query:
-- Delete all non-owner test users (keep the owner account)
DELETE FROM users WHERE open_id NOT IN (SELECT open_id FROM (SELECT open_id FROM users ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS first_user);
-- Reset the owner's consultation counters and test data
UPDATE users SET 
  consultations_remaining = 0,
  free_consultations_used = 0,
  free_consultations_total = 0,
  subscription_type = 'free'
WHERE open_id IN (SELECT open_id FROM (SELECT open_id FROM users ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS first_user);
